task_completion.description: Open the existing 'Experienced Developer' job position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo HR application shows the details page for the 'Experienced Developer' job position.
A new job position form is open, showing evidence of being duplicated from the source (e.g., action menu showing 'Duplicate' was clicked, or pre-filled fields matching the source job).

task_completion.description: Set the name of the new job position to 'Senior Python Developer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Job Position' or 'Job Title' text field contains exactly 'Senior Python Developer'.

task_completion.description: Assign the new job position to the 'R&D USA' department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Department' dropdown or text field is set to 'R&D USA'.

task_completion.description: Set the Expected New Employees (Recruitment Target) to 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Expected New Employees' or 'Recruitment Target' number field is set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Save the newly created job position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The record is shown in a saved, non-editing state (e.g., the 'Save' button is hidden or replaced by 'Edit', or the new job appears in the main Job Positions list view).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Odoo GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The job name, department, and recruitment target are typed into the correct Odoo form fields, not just written in a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL queries, Python scripts, or direct database manipulation tools being used to insert the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the Odoo HR application. The source job to clone is 'Experienced Developer'. The new job must be named 'Senior Python Developer'. The target department must be set to 'R&D USA'. The recruitment target (Expected New Employees) must be set to exactly 2.
